title: basellaceae
intro: The Basellaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a group of plants that are typically herbaceous, annual or perennial, and are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Members of the Basellaceae family are often characterized by their distinctive leaves and stems, and produce small, often fragrant flowers. This family includes popular edible plants such as the okra and the Malabar spinach, which are valued for their nutritious leaves and stems.
